title: Change container.locked to batched
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

To try to help lessen the confusion (at least my own) changed the variable named "locked" to "batched" in the container structure.

comments.body: much clearer to understand for someone not familiar with this code, LGTM

:pushpin: Commit bf15986 has been approved by `mheon`
